title: Design search ranking (Amazon/Google) + DSA review
focus: Relevance vs freshness vs diversity; LTR; long-tail queries.

items.label: Design Google/Amazon search ranking
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing Amazon's product search.
How do you balance relevance, freshness, and diversity in search ranking?
How would you handle long-tail queries with no historical data?

items.label: Learning-to-rank: pointwise, pairwise, listwise
interviewQuestions: Compare pointwise, pairwise, and listwise LTR — when does each fit?
Why does pairwise LTR usually beat pointwise on click-data, even though pointwise is simpler?
